tasks.subject: Send v3 HTML + cheat sheet + FAQ to JP; capture accept/edit/decline via walkthrough
tasks.notes: Deliverable set updated 2026-05-12 evening: v3 HTML at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-12_jp-presentation-v3.html (incorporates JP's ronda-1 questions + Plan dual + Servicios + 6 candados sub-block + closed grabaciones decision); cheat sheet (Ricardo-only) at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-12_jp-presentation-cheatsheet.md; FAQ for JP at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-12_jp-respuestas-ronda-1.md. v2 preserved at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-11_jp-presentation.html. Captures via walkthrough (t-010). Architecture lock + Plan 1 are gated on this.

tasks.subject: Write Plan 1 — Foundation + Scaffold + Skills 2-5 in parallel (writing-plans skill)
tasks.notes: Spec at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-11_company-system-design.md. Do not start until JP signs off on t-001.

tasks.subject: Investigate Odoo — install local, scope plugin surface, pricing tiers
tasks.notes: Hands-on technical investigation. Companion to t-008 (which captures and synthesizes Gemini CLI's preliminary research). Document findings in 00_META/proposals/.

tasks.subject: Decide Heavy/Hosted/Light default with JP
tasks.notes: Presentation suggests Light as default; JP's preference may differ. Resolve during architecture review conversation.

tasks.subject: First unpaid pilot client identification
tasks.notes: Stage 03 of roadmap. Needs scaffold + Skills 2-5 in place first.

tasks.subject: JP votes on top-5 brand HTML (names + palettes)
tasks.notes: Deliverable at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-12_brand-final-top5.html. Ricardo's ratings already recorded: Nexostrat 8/10 top, Aurora + The Architect tied 5/5 palettes. JP votes on each name (1-10) and each palette (1-5), confirms top pick. Blocks t-007 + t-009.

tasks.subject: Manual verification + acquisition of winning name's domains, handles, and trademark clearance
tasks.notes: After JP confirms a name: verify .com via Namecheap WHOIS (don't trust AI claims), check IG/X/TikTok/LinkedIn handles directly, search IMPI México (tmview) + SIC Colombia + USPTO TESS clase 42 for trademark conflicts. If Nexostrat wins: confirm @nexostrat IG fallback strategy (@nexostrat.ai or @nexostratco). If clean: purchase .com + .ai + secure social handles immediately. Namespace can change daily.

tasks.subject: Odoo opportunity memo — synthesize Gemini CLI preliminary findings + define follow-up research
tasks.notes: Gemini CLI delivered preliminary findings during 2026-05-12 session (unprompted scope drift, useful): MX dominance 700+ new implementations/month, MCP-based AI agent integration as differentiator, regional pricing MX vs CO (~USD 19.50 vs ~USD 13.60 per user/month for Custom tier), Odoo.sh ~USD 72/month sweet spot for deployment. Write formal memo at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-XX_odoo-opportunity-memo.md verifying these claims, scoping follow-up research questions, and identifying the consulting venture's specific Odoo angle. Companion to t-003 (which is the hands-on install + scope task).

tasks.subject: Propagate winning brand name + palette across project docs
tasks.notes: After name locked and domains purchased: update Plan Maestro DOCX + project README + CLAUDE.md scope reference + GEMINI.md + any other doc that mentions the venture by name. Wait until name is locked — no early renaming.

tasks.subject: Agendar walkthrough con JP (60-90 min, pantalla compartida)
tasks.notes: Pedirle a JP 2-3 ventanas esta semana. Walkthrough es el mecanismo de captura de t-001: yo presento v3 HTML sección por sección con apoyo del cheat sheet, JP comenta/edita/firma en vivo. Output esperado: decisiones 1 (interfaz Heavy/Hosted/Light), 2 (plan dual Stage 1/después/solo Odoo), 3 (aprobación general accept/amend/decline) cerradas. Las otras 5-6 decisiones pueden cerrarse o quedar anotadas para v4. Si JP propone enmiendas, después del walkthrough armo v4 antes de firma definitiva.
